questionHtml:
What is the internal energy of an ideal gas?


A.  The sum of the intermolecular potential energies of the molecules

B.  The energy required to raise the temperature by 1 K

C.  The sum of the kinetic energies of the molecules

D.  The energy required per kg to raise the temperature by 1 K

meta.title: What is the internal energy of an ideal gas? A. The sum of the intermolecular potential energies of the molecules B. The energy required to raise the temperature by 1 K C. The sum
